stemHtml: One of the correct actions to take in the case of overheated brakes after landing or an aborted take-off is to…

options.a: pour water on the heated brakes to cool them.
options.b: keep the aeroplane on the runway for as long as possible.
options.c: consider where to park the aircraft as regards proximity to other aircraft, buildings, etc.
options.d: set the parking brake and approach the main landing gear from the sides.
